subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine love! Drink thou, as much as thou canst, of this celestial wine, and be thou rendered unconscious by this cup, for love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مست می محبت الهی تا توانی از این باده بنوش و از این جام مدهوش گرد زیرا عشق
